headline: Autonomous agent stack live tomorrow; execution spread bias found 10x too pessimistic; HYP-107 real but magnitude unresolved pending live fills.
what_happened: Autonomous agent plists installed (morning 07:55, EOD 16:00, research 21:00 ET)—two operator commands required to activate and test.
Execution harness found median quoted spread on 59 gapper events is 0.6113%, not 8% round-trip; backtester bias is pessimistic by ~4.5pp per trade, not an edge.
HYP-107 (09:31 quiet-open long) confirmed real on n=57 holdout: +5.4% median gross, 70% win, p=0.0005; but 1–15% microcap spreads + LULD halts likely eat most/all, execution unresolved.
HYP-105/106 retracted: look-ahead leakage in Phase-3 ML features (overnight_gap and first-min vol measured through holding window); direction confirmed leak-free, magnitude not tradeable as-is.
Shadow gapper is green (2 signals, +0.0456% cumulative) last 5 days with zero signals since 07-15.
what_it_means: You have a real gapper continuation signal in HYP-107 (long from 09:31, moderate-gap quiet opens beat climax fades) but it depends entirely on live execution pricing—the backtester masked spread cost by ~10x. Autonomous morning and EOD routines ship today and will feed signal scoring, but the bottleneck is not discovery: it's fill realism on illiquid microcaps at market open. Install the plists and run the test loop to begin live capture.
todays_one_thing: Run the two operator commands to install and test-fire the autonomous agent plists; confirm morning routine at 07:55 ET captures real bid/ask on at least 3 gapper opens to validate the execution harness is wired correctly before scaling.
